summary: Tested new custom authentication system for Mídia Team (formerly Tomich Gestão de Mídia). All backend API tests passed (19/19). All frontend UI tests passed. Complete auth flow working: registration → pending approval → admin approval → login → dashboard access.
passed_tests: BACKEND: POST /api/auth/register - creates pending registration
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/register - validates required fields
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/register - rejects duplicate email
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login - endpoint exists
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login - authenticates valid credentials (admin@teste.com)
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login - rejects wrong password
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login - rejects nonexistent email
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/login - returns session cookie
BACKEND: GET /api/auth/me - requires authentication
BACKEND: GET /api/auth/me - returns user data with is_admin flag
BACKEND: GET /api/auth/pending-registrations - requires authentication
BACKEND: GET /api/auth/pending-registrations - lists pending registrations for admin
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - endpoint exists
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - returns reset token (dev mode)
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/logout - endpoint exists
BACKEND: Pending users cannot login until approved
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/approve-registration/{id} - endpoint exists
BACKEND: POST /api/auth/reject-registration/{id} - endpoint exists
BACKEND: GET /api/members - returns members list
FRONTEND: HomePage (/) loads with 'Mídia Team' branding
FRONTEND: HomePage has Login (Entrar) button in header
FRONTEND: HomePage has Register (Cadastrar) button in header
FRONTEND: HomePage has 'Começar agora' CTA button
FRONTEND: HomePage has 'Já tenho conta' button
FRONTEND: HomePage shows 'Desenvolvido por Tomich Tecnologia' footer

FRONTEND: RegisterPage has name, email, phone, password, confirm password fields
FRONTEND: RegisterPage shows 'Mídia Team' branding
FRONTEND: Registration submits and shows 'Cadastro Enviado!' success page
FRONTEND: Registration success shows pending approval message
FRONTEND: LoginPage (/login) loads with email/password fields
FRONTEND: LoginPage does NOT have Google login button (correctly removed)
FRONTEND: LoginPage has 'Esqueceu a senha?' link
FRONTEND: LoginPage has link to registration
FRONTEND: LoginPage shows 'Mídia Team' branding
FRONTEND: Login with admin@teste.com/senha123 redirects to /dashboard
FRONTEND: ForgotPasswordPage (/forgot-password) loads correctly
FRONTEND: ForgotPasswordPage has email input and submit button
FRONTEND: ForgotPasswordPage shows 'Mídia Team' branding
FRONTEND: Dashboard shows sidebar with 'Mídia Team' branding
FRONTEND: Dashboard sidebar shows 'Desenvolvido por Tomich Tecnologia' footer
FRONTEND: Dashboard shows current user info (Admin Teste)
FRONTEND: MembersPage shows 'Cadastros Pendentes' section with pending count
FRONTEND: MembersPage pending section shows user name, email
FRONTEND: MembersPage has 'Aprovar' and 'Rejeitar' buttons for pending registrations
FRONTEND: Approval button works - shows 'Cadastro aprovado com sucesso!' toast
FRONTEND: Approved user appears in members list
FRONTEND: Mobile header shows 'Mídia Team' branding
FRONTEND: Mobile menu shows 'Desenvolvido por Tomich Tecnologia' footer

test_credentials.note: admin@teste.com is the first user and was auto-approved as admin

seed_data_creation: Created test registrations during testing. One user (test_pending_k0zaxg@teste.com) was approved and now appears in members list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom authentication system fully tested and working. Flow: 1) First user registers → auto-approved as admin. 2) Subsequent users register → go to pending_registrations collection. 3) Admin sees 'Cadastros Pendentes' section on Members page. 4) Admin clicks 'Aprovar' → user moved to registered_users and added to members. 5) Approved user can now login. Google auth has been removed from login page. All pages show 'Mídia Team' branding and 'Desenvolvido por Tomich Tecnologia' footer.

branding.google_removed: PASS - No Google button on login page

public_routes.homepage: PASS - / loads with branding and CTA buttons

registration_flow.subsequent_users_pending: PASS - New users go to pending state
registration_flow.pending_display: PASS - Admin sees pending list on Members page
